description:
Overview:

1. Hygienic Chopping: Keep your food healthy with our vegetable chopper that cleans thoroughly after every use. The removable design ensures convenience and safety, while the washable parts leave no sanitary corners.
2. Work More Efficiently: Switching between multiple cutting edges and cutting, slicing, and grating with ease as per your diverse cooking needs. Our vegetable chopper provides five replaceable Cutting edges to ensure enhanced cutting flexibility, enabling you to prepare your meals efficiently and diversify your culinary creations.
3. Smoother Process: Cut down your meal prep time with this vegetable chopper that efficiently slices and dices, and easily completes shredding tasks. Enjoy a streamlined kitchen process and more time to savor your creations.
4. Safe and Harmless: Upgrade your kitchen game with our vegetable chopper, crafted from high-quality food contact-grade materials to ensure material safety and food-grade compliance. Experience hassle-free chopping with peace of mind!

5. Effortless Maintenance: Designed with a detachable build, this vegetable chopper is not only sturdy and simple to upkeep, but Its economical and eco-friendly nature also ensures an extended product lifespan while facilitating easy cleaning and hassle-free part replacement.


Product information:
Product Name: multifunctional stainless steel shredded device
Color: transparent color [3 knives/Without basket], transparent color [5 knives/Without basket], transparent color [3 knives/with basket], transparent color [5 knives/with basket]
Material: PET PP ABS TPR


Packing list:
1*Wire cutter
